sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.description: Looks up an existing warranty claim record by number or sys_id to retrieve its details.
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.inputs: [{"name":"identifier","value":"","description":"Claim number or sys_id to look up","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"crudInputs","value":{"operation":"lookup","table":{"value":"x_snc_medwc_auto_0_warranty_claim","displayValue":"x_snc_medwc_auto_0_warranty_claim"},"query":"number={{identifier}}^ORsys_id={{identifier}}","returnFields":[{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"sys_id","label":"sys_id","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"sys_id","sublabel":"sys_id"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"number","label":"number","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"number","sublabel":"number"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"customer_name","label":"customer_name","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"customer_name","sublabel":"customer_name"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"device_serial_number","label":"device_serial_number","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"device_serial_number","sublabel":"device_serial_number"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"device_name","label":"device_name","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"device_name","sublabel":"device_name"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"claim_reason","label":"claim_reason","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"claim_reason","sublabel":"claim_reason"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"state","label":"state","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"state","sublabel":"state"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"priority","label":"priority","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"priority","sublabel":"priority"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"agent_decision","label":"agent_decision","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"agent_decision","sublabel":"agent_decision"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"agent_recommendation","label":"agent_recommendation","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"agent_recommendation","sublabel":"agent_recommendation"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"warranty_details","label":"warranty_details","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"warranty_details","sublabel":"warranty_details"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"warranty_expiry","label":"warranty_expiry","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"warranty_expiry","sublabel":"warranty_expiry"},{"excludedOperators":[],"extendedOperators":null,"name":"short_description","label":"short_description","type":"string","referenceTable":null,"referenceTableDefaultField":null,"referenceKey":null,"dictionaryAttributes":[],"id":"short_description","sublabel":"short_description"}],"limit":"5"},"description":"Lookup operation configuration","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null}]
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.name: Lookup Warranty Claim Record
